issues.message:
Could not find Chrome (ver. 121.0.6167.85). This can occur if either
 1. you did not perform an installation before running the script (e.g. `npx puppeteer browsers install chrome`) or
 2. your cache path is incorrectly configured (which is: C:\Users\a1521\.cache\puppeteer).
For (2), check out our guide on configuring puppeteer at https://pptr.dev/guides/configuration.
aiResult.tests is not iterable (cannot read property undefined)
